visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, dark, wavy hair is captured in a selfie-perspective medium close-up shot. She is wearing a dark, sleeveless dress with an intricate gold baroque pattern and a white butterfly-shaped accessory at the neckline. The setting is a simple indoor room with a plain, light-colored wall and an air conditioner visible in the background. (2) She speaks directly to the camera, her facial expressions shifting to reflect her narrative. The lighting is bright and soft, focusing on her facial features and slight head movements as she talks. No other people or significant objects enter the frame. She appears focused on the delivery of her speech. (3) Her expression turns to a look of confusion or mock disbelief as she completes her story. To emphasize her reaction, three yellow question marks appear as a graphic overlay next to her head. The lighting remains consistent as she holds this expression for a brief moment to sell the joke. (4) The screen abruptly cuts to black for the final second of the video, punctuating the end of the short storytelling sequence. This creates a sharp visual transition that aligns with the sudden appearance of the comedic sound effect heard in the audio track.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear female voice begins speaking in a natural, conversational tone. The speech rate is moderate, and the pitch is slightly high but pleasant. There is no background music or significant ambient noise, indicating a quiet indoor recording environment with very high signal-to-noise ratio. The voice is well-projected and exhibits clear articulation. (2) As the narration continues, the speaker's tone remains consistent, with expressive inflections that suggest she is sharing a humorous anecdote. The vocal quality is smooth and without noticeable strain or roughness. There are no competing sound effects or background textures during this linear speech section, keeping the focus entirely on her voice. (3) A sudden, high-intensity sound effect of a distorted, loud laugh or shout triggers a new phase. This is a common social media meme sound effect, characterized by high spectral brightness and percussive energy. It serves as a comedic punctuation mark, lasting until the audio track ends abruptly with the visual cut to black.
